programme.title: On the Case: Blood, Sweat and Tears
programme.desc: A cold case team reopens the investigation into the murder of 36-year-old Linda Robinson who is savagely murdered while her seven-year-old niece is asleep in the next room.

programme.title: On the Case: An Uninvited Guest
programme.desc: A son discovers his mother's violent murder and police must track down the killer who committed a deadly betrayal.

programme.title: On the Case: No Body Two Crimes
programme.desc: A Wilmington, North Carolina, woman is reported missing after she fails to show up for her own birthday celebration. Police never imagined that their investigation would ultimately reveal a gruesome second crime.

programme.title: On the Case: A Brand New Dress
programme.desc: An argument among sisters over a new dress leads a young girl to leave her house to calm down. But when she never returns, the desperate search to find her begins.

programme.title: On the Case: Justice Never Quits
programme.desc: Mary-Jane Marquardt, mother and wife from Chippewa, Wisconsin, was found stabbed to death in her own home. With Mary-Jane's son also missing, the detectives couldn't help but wonder if his disappearance was connected to the murder.

programme.title: On the Case: 22 Hours of Terror
programme.desc: A 12-year-old girl is kidnapped during a home invasion, and police frantically search for her and her abductor. Paula Zahn explores the case.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Fast-food workers in clown costumes chase the Sliders to a resort where Maggie (Kari Wuhrer) is traumatized by a sadistic, virtual reality Civil War game.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: After being dumped in the middle of the Pacific ocean, the Sliders are rescued by a merchant ship populated by a band of pirates.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders must pull off the heist of a precious gem that they need to fix their malfunctioning timer.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders discover Los Angeles under a desert and Rembrandt (Cleavant Derricks) is worshipped as an ancient deity.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: An energy barrier threatens to consume everything in its path as the Sliders rush to prevent Mallory (Robert Floyd) from being transformed into their nemesis, Dr. Geiger (guest star Peter Jurasik).

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The sliders' first jump lands them in an ice-aged San Francisco and then onto an Earth where Wade's (Sabrina Lloyd) ally is the head of a rebel group. Part 1.

programme.title: Moesha: Prom Fright
programme.desc: Mo agrees to go to another school’s prom with the son of Frank’s friend so she will no longer be busted.

programme.title: Moesha: Grandpoppa Don’t Take No Mess
programme.desc: Moesha tries to get sympathy from her visiting grandfather over having to go to a new school.

programme.title: Moesha: Labor Day Jammy
programme.desc: Mo’s new school’s annual fund-raiser conflicts with Crenshaw High’s final summer blowout “Freaknik”, and Frank and Dee insist Mo should attend the fund-raiser.

programme.title: Moesha: Day One
programme.desc: Mo attends the first day at her new school and is miserable. She has only made one friend and feels out of place.

programme.title: Moesha: Age Ain’t Nothing
programme.desc: Hakeem begins to date an older woman he meets at his store.

programme.title: Moesha: My Mom’s Not An Ottoman
programme.desc: Dee wins a free decorating consultation at Mo’s school raffle and can’t wait to redo the house.

programme.title: Moesha: The Play Scene
programme.desc: Mo writes a scene from a play set in a Blues Lounge in the 1940s for her English class, and our cast acts it out for us.

programme.desc: Mo tells her friends at the Den that Hayley’s dad is an important record executive.

programme.title: Moesha: Keepin’ It Real
programme.desc: Mo is attracted to a classmate she is working with on a project.

programme.title: Moesha: Halloween Part 1 – Kim’s Revenge
programme.desc: Mo, Kim and Niecy decide to dress as “The Women of Batman” for Halloween.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil and Eden's relationship is strained when he is named one of the top ten bachelors in New York City and has to pretend to be single. Stuart dates the twin sister of his evil ex, Sabrina.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Nicki (Leah Remini) returns to start her new life in the city, disrupting Stuart's professional life and Phil's personal life. Haskell and Eden attend an all-nude production of "Twelve Angry Men."

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell hatches a plan to win over Nicki. Stuart and Phil visit Stuart's old home one last time before it is sold.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil unknowingly sleeps with a nun and must keep Nicki from finding out. Haskell and Eden take care of a fussy Holly after she suffers an injury.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly accidentally sets Haskell up with a gay man. Stuart helps Phil get over his fear of funerals.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart asks Nicki to accompany him to an important dinner. Phil and Haskell consider getting vasectomies together.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly dates an older man only to find he lives in an assisted living facility. Nicki comes to Phil with a proposition.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: In the wake of Haskell declaring his love for Nicki, Holly tries to play cupid. Stuart secretly arranges for Phil to get together with his high school crush.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly represents Nicki in her divorce, but lets her own history with marriage get in the way. Phil tries to prove he’s not getting older by dating a much younger woman.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly joins a grief support group to meet a man. Stuart and Haskell help prepare Phil for a talk show appearance after he develops a lisp.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell dates a beautiful woman who Phil is convinced is really a man. Stuart is filled with guilt after he sleeps with a woman who thinks he’s a war hero.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell’s estranged brother shows up and asks for one small favor: his kidney. Holly mentors a teenager who turns out to like Eden’s job more than hers.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Jeweler's Wife
programme.desc: The wife of a successful jeweler is found dead in their home. The jeweler immediately falls under suspicion, but he's not alone.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Sweet Killer
programme.desc: An aging hippy is going through bad times. When he's found dead in his home with a gut of antifreeze, it's a closed case. Then a shocking confession reveals a maelstrom of lies and a story of cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Hijacked
programme.desc: In 1971, before the era of airport security, a Black Panther hijacks a plane to Havana, Cuba. A thirty-year old cold case is finally solved in 2002 by a fluke of modern technology.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Stranger
programme.desc: Bored at home, a retiree takes a job at a 24-hour convenience store. On her third night at work a customer finds her behind the register in a pool of blood.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Burning Obsession
programme.desc: In 1988, a promiscuous 22-year old boy from the Sikh community has one affair too many and ends up losing his life. Diligent detective work and DNA help police nail the killer who believed he had gotten away with murder.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Secret Life
programme.desc: In Calgary, Alberta, a beautiful Ethiopian woman is found brutally strangled. The victim’s husband seems genuinely distraught over his wife’s death, but there is something strangely suspicious about him.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Flying Bandit
programme.desc: In 1986, an American becomes one of Canada’s most prolific bank and jewellery bandits after he pulls off one of the biggest heists in Canadian history. As more robberies occur, the police become more determined to catch the mastermind behind them all.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Vanished
programme.desc: A small town public school teacher fails to arrive for work for the first time in thirty years, leaving an empty house and a baffled community.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Pierre and Gabrielle Labrell Case
programme.desc: After an ordinary dinner, Pierre and Gabrielle Labrell suffer severe abdominal pains. Taken to hospital, the couple die several days apart. The food poisoning theory is quickly ruled out and forensic tests show the Labrells were poisoned with arsenic.

programme.title: Scorpion: The Fast & The Nerdiest
programme.desc: After Sylvester scores big on THE PRICE IS RIGHT, Team Scorpion must infiltrate a high-end car smuggling operation about to ship bioweapons to South America.

programme.title: Scorpion: Ticker
programme.desc: When Los Angeles' blood supply is hacked and deemed unusable because of fear it's been tainted, Team Scorpion must find the culprit.

programme.title: Scorpion: Djibouti Call
programme.desc: While on a secret mission in Djibouti, Africa, with his new Homeland protege, Tim Armstrong (Scott Porter), Cabe is captured and Team Scorpion must save him.

programme.title: Scorpion: Twist And Shout
programme.desc: Team Scorpion's mission to recover the remains of fallen Marines in Vietnam is threatened along with their lives when a deadly tornado heads directly towards them.

programme.title: Scorpion: Hard Knox
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is hired by the Department of Defense to break into Fort Knox and "steal" a precious artifact in order to test their security.

programme.title: Scorpion: Chernobyl Intentions
programme.desc: Team Scorpion goes to Chernobyl to repair the decaying nuclear reactor before a catastrophic meltdown.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Stung
programme.desc: Using a local car dealership, 15 Division runs a sting operation to crack down on suspects with outstanding warrants. One of the criminals they capture tries to bargain for a lighter sentence

programme.title: Rookie Blue: In Plain View
programme.desc: When a police informant is found murdered, 15 Division sets its sights on finding a weak link in the notoriously brutal East Jameson gang. Andy has to work closely with Detective Jo Rosati, a woman who seems far too interested in Andy’s fiancé, Luke.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: When a woman gets brutally attacked in the same manner as deceased rookie cop Zoe Martinelli. Det. Luke Callaghan is convinced that it’s the same suspect.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Monster
programme.desc: After a seemingly drunken man collapses in the barn, 15 Division is put under quarantine. Andy and Swarek work together to find the accomplice of a dyed blue bank robber

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Brotherhood
programme.desc: Dov and Gail work together under Swarek’s expert tutelage in a stake-out operation to stop an Asian gang from killing a snitch.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: 15 Division’s hunt for an armed robber leads them to the scene of a horrible car accident. While Andy deals with a woman pinned in her car, the other officers must track and apprehend the fugitive

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Book of Love

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Myth of the Maze
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and Claudia visit Athens, Greece to search the Minotaur's maze for the legendary golden twine.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Afterlife and Death

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Etched in Stone
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and Stewie Harper head to Stockholm, Sweden to find the Runestone of King Jann I of Norway.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Irish Crown Affair
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel head to Dublin, Ireland in search of the missing crown of the last King of Ireland.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: A Vanishing Art
programme.desc: Accompanying Max the magician, Sydney and Nigel journey to Atlantic City, New Jersey in search of Hungary's lost and allegedly cursed Royal Scepter.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Dara hosts a five-round gaming contest between two teams that each feature a guest. Sara Cox and Daniel Sloss battle it out on games including `Wipeout', `FIFA 17' and `Crossy Road'.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Dara and the others are joined by comedians Ellie Taylor and Jon Richardson for a five-round gaming contest. Along the way, Ellie and Jon battle it out on retro games including `Crash Team Racing' and `Aztec Challenge'.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Russell Howard and Rachel Riley pick up a control pad and lock horns on video games such as Sensible Soccer and Nidhogg. Think GamesMaster crossed with a panel show!

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Josie Long and Dave Gorman duel on Frogger and Pong.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Jammy old Jason Manford and Ed Byrne get to have a laugh and attempt some worldies on FIFA. Dara O Briain's brilliant retro game show also features Asteroids and Kororinpa.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Richard Osman and Sara Pascoe compete in a series of games including `Galaga' and `Micro Machines'.

programme.title: Medium: Psych
programme.desc: Allison dreams about a schizophrenic child, but when she meets her in real life, she seems perfectly normal -- but has a mentally ill roommate.

programme.title: Medium: Will The Real Fred Rovick Please Stand Up?
programme.desc: Allison keeps seeing the face of one man in the faces of other people, including Joe, and must figure out why. Meanwhile, Ariel has a difficult time babysitting a mischievous boy.

programme.title: Medium: How To Beat A Bad Guy
programme.desc: Allison enrolls herself in self-defense classes. Meanwhile, Devalos works on a teenager's rape case, as well as looking into a suspected murder involving a police officer.

programme.title: Medium: Allison Rolen Got Married
programme.desc: Viewers get a look back at Allison and Joe's wedding, and how the growing strength of Allison's "powers" affected the soon-to-be-married couple.

programme.title: Medium: There Will Be Blood...Type A
programme.desc: Allison and her daughters share the same dream of a strange girl who may be linked to a string of murders. Meanwhile, Joe has another disagreement with his boss.

programme.title: Medium: There Will Be Blood...Type B
programme.desc: Allison discovers that the strange girl from her and her daughters' dreams is the serial killer's next target, and she must protect the girl from danger while also trying to work with her to catch the killer.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Gay Discount
programme.desc: Mr. Kim offers a gay discount at the store, while Mrs. Kim tries to find Janet a cool, Christian, Korean boyfriend.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Janet's Photos
programme.desc: Mr. Kim gets competitive with Janet over who is the better photographer. When Jung applies for a promotion, it has a surprising effect on Mrs. Kim and Kimchee.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Ddong Chim
programme.desc: Jung draws the wrong kind of attention from his boss when he gives Kimchee a Korean wedgie at work. Mr. Kim commissions Janet's friend Gerald to take his photo instead of asking Janet.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Frank and Nayoung
programme.desc: Mr. Kim is frustrated with Frank, a repairman who talks too much, while Janet's cousin Nayoung visits from Korea, challenging Janet's sense of what it means to "be Korean."

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Wingman
programme.desc: Mr. Chin asks Mr. Kim to be his wingman on a date, which is fine until Mrs. Kim tags along. Janet asks Jung to help her fix a dripping pipe at the store, but the repair is interrupted by an intruder.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Rude Kid
programme.desc: Mr. Kim disciplines Janet's professor's kid, with unexpected results for Janet. Jung discovers that Kimchee has found a questionable way to make extra money.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Hapkido
programme.desc: Jung runs into an old flame at work. Meanwhile, Appa is less than impressed with the methods used by Janet's hapkido teacher.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Service
programme.desc: A new female pastor strikes a chord with Appa. Jung's worlds collide when his friend starts dating his sister.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Best Before
programme.desc: Are "Best Before" dates on canned food meaningless? Appa is about to find out. Meanwhile, Jung surprises his mom by helping out at church.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Janet's New Job
programme.desc: When Janet lands a new job that actually pays, Gerald steps in to fill her shoes at the convenience store.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Handyman
programme.desc: Mr. Kim fixes a toilet for Kimchee. Janet believes there is more to Edwin and Mrs. Kim's relationship.

programme.title: JAG: Silent Service
programme.desc: Mac and Harm are having trouble relating...a result of working together under stress for so long.

programme.title: JAG: King of the Greenie Board
programme.desc: Harm is now a Tomcat division commander aboard the carrier USS Patrick Henry that is patrolling the Mediterranean near Yugoslavia.

programme.title: JAG: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: The Russians are furious over the killing of their peacekeepers and the Navy sends Mac, Brumby, and Roberts to the Patrick Henry to conduct the court-martial of Lt. Buxton.

programme.title: JAG: True Calling
programme.desc: When a petty officer smuggles a pregnant Serbian woman aboard the carrier in order to save her from a vengeful fiancée, he's arrested and scheduled to be court-martialed.

programme.title: JAG: Psychic Warrior
programme.desc: When a Navy research project involving ESP and psychic phenomenon goes awry, resulting in the death of one of the research subjects, the Admiral in charge is court-martialed.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Michael's Game
programme.desc: (S02E017) Alison complains to the brass about Amanda's mistreatment of her. After the FBI shows up with questions about her father's disappearance, Amanda is ordered to take a vacation.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Arousing Suspicion
programme.desc: (S02E018) After Michael shuns her, Sydney tells Jane the truth about her involvement with prostitution and Michael's scheme against Robert. Jane blames herself for Sydney's problems and throws Michael out.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Young Men and the Sea
programme.desc: (S02E019) Amanda and Jo invest in Reed's business, and Jake is hired as chief mechanic. Jo displays a lack of trust toward Reed after he leaves a suitcase of personal possessions in her care. Michael becomes addicted to painkillers.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Parting Glances
programme.desc: (S02E020) Jake and Amanda pull out of Reed's business when Jake discovers some inconsistencies in his story, but Jo accuses him of jealousy. Reed picks up a shipment of drugs on the boat while Jo is sleeping on board.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Swept Away
programme.desc: (S02E021) Reed plans to start over in Mexico after one last major drug deal. Jo knocks him overboard with a harpoon, but the boat runs out of gas. When Reed climbs on board and holds her at gunpoint, Jo is forced to shoot and kill him.

programme.title: Melrose Place: With This Ball and Chain
programme.desc: (S02E022) Jo faces murder charges following Reed's death. Jake is angry when Amanda refuses to help Jo because she could be implicated through her financial ties to Reed. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Pancake Madness
programme.desc: An addiction to pancakes threatens to send Sabrina’s life spinning out of control.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Good Will Haunting

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: And The Sabrina Goes To
programme.desc: A spell to get her just desserts leaves Sabrina with egg on her face instead.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Nobody Nose * Libby Like Sabrina Knows * Libby
programme.desc: An out-of-control magic spaceship lands Sabrina and Salem inside Libby’s brain.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Christmas Amnesia
programme.desc: It’s beginning to look a lot like Christmas until Sabrina accidentally erases the holiday

programme.title: Corner Gas

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 19

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women burn madly with jealousy, an anger so deep they’ll kill to satisfy it. What makes them turn from “green with envy” to “lethal with jealousy?" Find out as we explore their hearts of darkness.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Secrets and Lies

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hearts of Stone

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Gone Wrong

programme.title: The FBI Files

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hidden Agenda

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Unabomber

programme.title: The New Detectives: Forsaken Trust

programme.title: The New Detectives: Cold Blooded

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay puts two teams of aspiring chefs through a series of tough challenges. The teams meet new members before heading into a team challenge in which they must prepare a tasting menu for a dog show.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams roll the dice to determine the ingredients for their next team challenge, while a contestant leaves due to an injury. The cooks cater for music legends during dinner service, including Stewart Copeland and Steven Tyler.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Following the departure of two contestants from the competition, those remaining are challenged to create Indian-inspired meals, with the winning team earning a day of pampering at a luxurious spa.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay puts aspiring chefs through tough challenges. The teams are challenged to a blind taste test. Dinner service is held in honour of a group of decorated firefighters.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Snowtown: Bodies in the Barrels
programme.desc: In 1999, eight bodies are found in six barrels filled with acid in a former bank vault in rural Snowtown, 50 kilometres north of Adelaide.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Butchered Boys
programme.desc: This episode revisits Adelaide's notorious Adelaide Family Murders case, where six young Adelaide men were murdered during the 1970s and '80s. The victims were found in random locations throughout the state, their bodies neatly cut into pieces.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Cop Killer: The Winchester Assassination

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Devil Inside: John Ernest Cribb

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Michael Kanaan: Shoot to Kill

programme.desc: Dog and his team are out to revoke bail on Eugene, a chronic heroin addict. They find him in a squalid apartment with a huge stockpile of syringes, and they can see that his physical condition is deteriorating.

programme.desc: Dog and his team fight the war on ice-crystal methamphetamine-on many fronts. They appear on a special anti-drug float in a parade. Then they go after bail-jumping Pana, a convicted drug dealer.

programme.title: NEW Half & Half: The Big Phat Mouth Episode (Part 2)

programme.title: Girlfriends: Take Me Out After the Ball Game

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Line Goes Dead

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Justified

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Settle the Score
programme.desc: When Johnny Crawford is killed in his easy chair, police are perplexed to learn he may have been shot over a musical instrument. It soon becomes clear the young man wasn’t killed for his own sins.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My Second Case
programme.desc: A woman’s mangled body is found beside a lonely stretch of highway. When the coroner suspects foul play, Kenda is called in to solve the second homicide case of his career.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Hudson & Orchid, and LA Animal Control
programme.desc: Two Great Danes battle for control. Cesar helps the city of Los Angeles' Animal Control department with its aggressive new pet ownership program by riding along with one of its officers.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Lives Changed
programme.desc: In this special episode, Cesar revisits some of the incredible Dog Whisperer stories of the past four years and shares his reactions to the changes in the lives of these special packs.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bikini, Fella, Winston and Oliver
programme.desc: Bull terrier won't behave at home and has irrational fear of grooming; Jack Russell / Italian Greyhound mix cries and barks whenever left alone; a police officer's Yorkies are disturbing the peace.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Hounds from Hell
programme.desc: Rescue dog owners need help with their hell hounds. Terrier Sammy, cries around skateboarders and large dogs, Sahzi, and a Belgian Tervuren, won't enter the kitchen or certain hallways.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Wolf-Dogs: Out of the Wild
programme.desc: The crossing of wolves and domestic dogs has led to a whole new set of problems with the wolf-dog hybrid. Cesar brings in wolf-dog expert Jennifer McCarthy to aid him in this special episode.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The London Nail Bombings
programme.desc: London was brought to a standstill in April 1999 when 23-year-old political extremist David Copeland caused terror with a bombing campaign.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: DNA Of A Murder: Andrew George
programme.desc: Hilda Murrell, a 78-year-old distinguished rose-grower, was found dead in woodland near her home town. Despite a huge investigation by the British police, detectives failed to find her killer and conspiracy theories muddied the waters still further.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Time Of Death: Albert Walker
programme.desc: When a Devonshire fisherman hauled in his nets on July 28 1996, he made a gruesome discovery: among that day’s catch was a dead body. There was nothing to identify the man’s body except a Rolex watch and a small maple leaf tattoo on his hand.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Body In The Suitcase: Lorenzo Simon
programme.desc: On 12th May 2014 a human torso was discovered in a suitcase during routine maintenance work on a Birmingham canal. With no useable DNA and no other body parts, the case initially seemed impossible to crack.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Saturday Night Strangler: Joe Kappen
programme.desc: In 1973, three young girls were beaten, raped and strangled over a six-week period. The Saturday Night Strangler escaped justice for almost 30 years. But new techniques in DNA technology and a midnight exhumation finally uncovered the killer.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.139

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.173

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.171

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.44

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.257

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.200
programme.desc: Teens deny vandalizing a teacher's car with rocks; a surprise witness emerges. A woman sues her ex-fiancé for money invested in his home and furniture return.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.192

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.245

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.45
programme.desc: A woman accuses her former live-in boyfriend of vandalism and skipping out on his share of the rent/Alleged harassment that led to a man’s dismissal at work and a dispute over an unpaid loan land ex-lovers in court.

programme.desc: A man faces a lawsuit for unpaid rent and property damage stemming from a Jacuzzi party, marijuana arrests, and roommate issues. Another man accuses his cousin of violence and property damage after refusing her late-night alcohol run request.

programme.desc: Car salesman sues ex-girlfriend for default on used car sale; she countersues for illegal repossession. Woman's toddlers taken by children's services, blames ex; he and new girlfriend sue for unpaid loan and false allegations.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Long Island Serial Killer
programme.desc: A report on the disappearance of Shannan Gilbert, near Gilgo Beach, New York. The search for Shannan led to the discovery of a total of ten bodies in the scrub brush of Gilgo Beach, leading police to suspect the work of a serial killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Perfectly Executed - Part 1
programme.desc: A report on the 1994 murders of the Rafay family -- Sultana Rafay, her husband Tariq and their autistic daughter, Basma -- focusing on the pursuit and arrest of the two suspects: Atif Rafay, the only surviving family member, and his friend Sebastian Burns

programme.title: 48 Hours: Perfectly Executed - Part 2
programme.desc: Part 2 focuses on the role of the Canadian Mounted Police in the investigation and sting operation put in place to obtain confessions from Rafay and Burns. Having taken refuge in Canada, Rafay and Burns were extradited to Seattle to face murder charges.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report on the investigation into the 1960 murder of Irena Garza, in McAllen, Texas, and the efforts that family members and police have taken to bring the suspect, a Roman Catholic priest, to trial for the crime.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Babysitter
programme.desc: Chris Routh, a responsible 14-year-old honor student loved children and earned money as a babysitter.. On July 25, 2001, Emily a child in his care suddenly stopped breathing. Was this a case of murder, an accident, or natural causes. Police investigate.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Reasonable Doubt
programme.desc: In September 1999, Brian Eftenoff of Phoenix, Az. Was convicted of murdering his wife, Judi. It was alleged that Eftenoff forced more than a gram of cocaine down his wife’s throat causing her to die of a cocaine-induced stroke.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Big Crush
programme.desc: The guys battle it out with their fierce former-employee, while a shill bidder threatens to ruin the day. When all hope seems lost, a set of monster truck tires and a mystery box are their last chance to come out on top.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sink or Swim

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Hail of Bullets

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Australia
programme.desc: In a crime that has been etched in the minds of Australians, Robert Farquharson drove his car into a dam, drowning his three young sons who were sitting in the back.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Australia
programme.desc: In 2001, a British couple driving in the Northern Territory were flagged down by a man who turned violent. Joanne Lees managed to escape, but Peter Falconio's body was never found.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Australia
programme.desc: The Strathfield massacre in Sydney in August 1991 will be remembered as one of Australia's most shocking gun crimes. Wade Frankum entered a shopping mall one afternoon, he stabbed a teenage girl before opening fire on unsuspecting shoppers.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Australia
programme.desc: Five-year-old Darcey Freeman suffered a horrific death at the hands of her father in January 2009. Driving her to her first day at school, he stopped on the Westgate Bridge and callously threw her off the side, in full view of her two older brothers.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Australia

programme.title: Myth Hunters

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Historical Museum, Moscow

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Smithsonian Institution, Washington DC
programme.desc: From the Zeros that bombed Pearl Harbor to the rocket that could take humans to Mars, discover the secrets inside the Smithsonian Institution.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Chateau of Versailles, Paris
programme.desc: From the schemes of Marie Antoinette to the spectrum of a star that reveals the origin of human life, discover the secrets inside the Chateau of Versailles.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Midwest Stormfest
programme.desc: This season the tornadoes begin early - in February. Through the season, George follows the big weather from Missouri west to the Dakotas, and dodges the huge, destructive Greensburg tornado in southern Kansas.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Hurricane Triple Threat
programme.desc: George chases deadly hurricanes in the USA: Gustav in Louisiana and Hanna in North Carolina. He then flies with USAF Hurricane Hunters into Ike over Cuba, meeting it again as it makes a wild destructive landfall in Galveston, Texas.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Hawaii: Surf & Snow
programme.desc: In Hawaii George explores the wild side: diving with Galapagos sharks, ascending to snow-covered Mauna Kea, dental cleaning by Peppermint Cleaner Shrimp, extreme surfing at Banzai Pipeline, getting his boots lit on fire by Kilauea volcano.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Arctic Winter
programme.desc: George links up with two experienced polar adventurers to explore frigid Canadian Arctic winter. The team uses skis to cross the fractured sea ice of Frobisher Bay, then dog teams to head North through the spectacular Auyuittuq Mountains.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Island Caving
programme.desc: Accompanied by a group of hardcore cavers from Alberta and British Columbia, George descends into spectacular caves that lead deep into the earth on Vancouver Island. The team carries inflatable kayaks to explore a dark underground river.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Crystal Cave
programme.desc: In 2000 in Chihuahua, Mexico, miners found a cave filled with giant crystals. Temperatures reach 120 degrees F and humidity nearly 100%. George leads an Explorers Club Flag Expedition into this extreme environment.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Highway to Hail
programme.desc: George and his team head into "bears' cage", looking to get beat up by the biggest, baddest hailstones in Texas and Oklahoma. Their storm chasing vehicles don't look too pretty after coming through these massive storms.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Winds Of Autumn
programme.desc: This year he starts off by getting prepared in a wind tunnel, then he and his chase partner Mark Robinson head to Newfoundland for more wild weather action. Then, it's off to another encounter where the wild wind fans a raging inferno.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Java: Land of Fire
programme.desc: In the Pacific Ring of Fire island of Java, George explores new ash eruptions from Anak Krakatau, whose 1883 eruption shook the world. He travels to Merapi and descends into Kawah Ijen to explore the world's largest lake of sulfuric acid.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Eco-Disasters
programme.desc: Uzbekistan's Aral Sea, once one of the largest freshwater lakes in the world, shrunk to 1/6 its previous size; a Crimea mountain carved into a submarine base; Chernobyl nuclear site reduced to a radioactive wasteland.

programme.title: Hunting the Edge of Space: The Mystery of the Milky Way
programme.desc: The Mystery of the Milky Way chronicles the history of telescopes, from Galileo's refractor to Newton's reflector and beyond. This episode also looks at recent missions, including the Herschel Space Observatory's examination of the Milky Wa

programme.title: In the Shadow of the Moon
programme.desc: Between 1968 and 1972, the world watched in awe each time an American spacecraft voyaged to the Moon. Only 12 men walked upon its surface and they remain the only human beings to have stood on another world.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 2: Moons
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 7: The Milky Way

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Inspector Lestrade looks to Holmes for answers, after two men are murdered on separate occasions.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes

programme.title: Sherlock: A Case of Evil

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes

programme.title: Wild Baltic Sea: Between Denmark and Latvia
programme.desc: From Denmark’s northernmost corner to the endless beaches of Latvia.

programme.title: Wild Baltic
programme.desc: The wide, often untouched wilderness of the Baltic hinterland is home to many animals. More than 35 brown bears live in the primeval forests of Alutaguse. In the spring, the Soomaa National Park transforms into a huge lake.

programme.title: Wildest Islands

programme.title: Wildest Indonesia

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Philippines: Islands of Mystery

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: An old client brings in Ian to build a classic 54’ Chevy pickup truck from the ground up with some major custom upgrades.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: One of Ian’s most infamous show cars, Space Junkie, comes back to into the shop in a bizarre turn of events. The gem is in desperate need of rehab and Ian brings it back to life, better than ever, with some major reworking!

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel delivers the fabrication goods as he transplants an old 1948' cab onto a modern roll-off truck and creates one bad-ass trash truck.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel brings his wild fabrication skills into the world of Volkswagen bugs, as he turns a stock bug into a full custom.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel enters the motorcycle world as he tries to turn a childhood dream into a reality by building a wild chopper trike from the ground up.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel transforms an old 1931 Ford jalopy into a street burning hot rod and attempts to bring back one of his wildest creations.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Cap and Gown
programme.desc: Friend of the family, Kili, is joining the team to help track down a runner on the Hawaiian island of Maui. This is not the only thing on their schedule, because after the hunt, Kili has to hurry off to his college graduation ceremony!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: And Baby Makes Three
programme.desc: Leland has to attend a Lamaze class before he can join the hunt--another Chapman is on the way! But when Dog starts to go after this accused jewelry thief without his fastest son, he learns that this fugitive puts the "R" in runner.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Tender Trap
programme.desc: When Dog discovers today's prey is a notorious ladies man, he knows just how to lure him in. The trap includes a suggestive phone call, a motel rendezvous, and a crew of bounty hunters waiting in the next room ready to break up the party!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Greed is Good

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Tears for Fears

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Picture This
programme.desc: A fugitive with a long criminal record has fled to Hawaii, and the bondsman on the mainland has asked Dog for help. Dog doesn't have much information to work with, but he can use the felon's desire to impress his friends to track him down.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: From Duck 'til Dawn
programme.desc: When the duck guys have to pull an all-nighter to finish some work, Willie decides he wants to join them. But when a dying smoke detector distracts them from their work, Jase and Willie head off to disarm it.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Burger Commander

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: G.I. Si
programme.desc: When Willie and Jase argue over an old G.I. Joe toy, it leads them into a debate over who would make a better soldier. To settle the score, Willie and Jase head out to the woods with their friends and children for a paintball match.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Jase and the Argonauts
programme.desc: When Willie gets a soft serve machine for himself, he tells the guys they can't use it until they're done working. But when Jase thinks this is unfair, he takes matters into his own hands and finds a better object to use as motivation.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Fowl Playhouse
programme.desc: When Jase finds out Jep is planning to buy his kids a fancy playhouse from a catalogue, he and the guys decide to build one for Jep themselves. But the playhouse ends up looking more like a military-style duck blind.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The Big LeCOWski

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck Dynasty

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Governor's Travels
programme.desc: When the Governor of Louisiana announces that he will be coming to Duck Commander to present Willie with a commerce award, John Luke volunteers to give the introduction speech.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Quack and Gown
programme.desc: With Reed's graduation day approaching, Jase decides to take Reed frog hunting the night before, like he did on the day of his own graduation. Willie and Si join in, and Jase tries to keep them from imparting their "college advice" on Reed.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Hands on a Woodchipper

programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark rescue victims trapped in a car, thanks to a helpful dog.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: An investigation into a possible secret space force operated by America.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: In 1947, there was an unprecedented wave of UFO sightings that propelled the UFO phenomenon to the world stage. What were the US Air Force's findings?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Triangle Terror: For years, the flying saucer has been synonymous with UFO terror. But is it still the spacecraft that frightens us the most? Or has fear taken a new shape?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Alien Achilles Heel. Many believe aliens are already here on Earth. Could they be plotting an attack? And if so, can humans survive their weapons' terrifying capabilities?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Countdown To Disclosure: Evidence suggests the world's governments could be on the verge of announcing everything they know about UFOs. What will this mean for our society?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 7
programme.desc: Experts open previously off-limits files in a bid to answer some of the most mysterious questions surrounding UFOs and extra-terrestrial life.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: For many people, the most credible UFO reports are those raised by law enforcement. We investigate the most significant reports from police records.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Aliens on the Moon

programme.title: Dynasty: Alexis in Blunderland
programme.desc: Suspecting her accountant has worked with Sean to ruin Colbyco, Alexis faces the reality she may lose her empire; receiving bad news from her doctor, Krystle asks Fallon to gather the family.

programme.title: Dynasty: Every Picture Tells a Story

programme.title: Dynasty: The Last Hurrah

programme.desc: Krystle's operation is unsuccessful as she slips into a coma. Told she will probably never recover, a grieving Blake returns to Denver; Sammy Jo is attacked by an unknown assailant; Dex discovers Joanna is a link to Alexis' controller, Heath.

programme.title: War Story: Not One Step Back: The Battle of Stalingrad
programme.desc: In the summer of 1942, the Germans advance to seize the rich oilfields of the Caucasus. In their path, the city of Stalingrad, its Soviet defenders personally ordered by Stalin to “take not one step back".

programme.title: War Story: Behind Enemy Lines
programme.desc: Royal Canadian Air Force bombing operations play a crucial role in disrupting German infrastructure ahead of the Normandy invasion of June 1944. In the process, dozens of Canadian airmen are forced to bail out over occupied Belgium and France.

programme.title: War Story: Whistle for a Tiffy
programme.desc: From D-Day, Tactical Air Force fighter-bombers played a pivotal role in Allied battlefield success; Canadian soldiers knew they could always “whistle for a Tiffy”.

programme.title: War Story: Surviving Dieppe
programme.desc: The Dieppe assault of 19 August 1942 is the worst day in Canadian military history: in just 8 hours, 907 Canadians were killed. For 2,000 of their comrades, nearly three years of incarceration in German prison camps followed.

programme.title: War Story: D-Day plus 1
programme.desc: The Canadian stand against the 12th SS Panzer Division Hitlerjugend immediately after D-Day allowed the Allies to switch to the offensive and truly begin the liberation of Europe.

programme.title: War Story: Falaise, the corridor of death
programme.desc: The Canadian army played the pivotal role in closing the Falaise Gap and ensuring Allied victory in the Normandy Campaign in August 1944.

programme.title: War Story: Where Hell is: The Leopold and the Scheldt
programme.desc: The Allies liberated Antwerp, the world’s largest deep-water port, on 4 September 1944, but it could only be accessed via the Scheldt Estuary, the perfect place for the Germans to make a stand.

programme.title: War Story
programme.desc: In April and May 1945, the long-suffering Dutch people, enduring the German-imposed Hongerwinter famine, enthusiastically welcomed their Canadian liberators, establishing the intense connection sustained for 70 years.

programme.title: War Wrecks: The Untold Stories: The Lost Tanks of D-Day
programme.desc: In Normandy, June 6, 1944, a dozen Sherman tanks equipped with floats, the famous Duplex Drives (DD), leave their ship to swim to Omaha Beach... not all of them make it.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.desc: Dylan receives an anonymous text warning him that his online love, Ally, is not who she says she is. After the mystery texter is revealed, Nev and Max uncover a huge web of deceit! (S6, ep10)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Colleen met Tony online and fell in love. Despite never meeting, Tony proposed over the phone and Colleen accepted! Nev and Max help her face reality to reveal the man she's engaged to! (S6, ep11)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: After Jonathon's online love disappears, he enlists Nev and Max to help track him down. But when the guys discover a former catfish is involved, they begin to suspect Jonathon himself. (S6, ep13)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Southern sweetheart Kelsie is madly in love with her online Romeo, Brandon. But after years of endless excuses about meeting up, Kelsie recruits Nev and Max to find who Brandon really is. (S6, ep14)

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: Nazi Germany boasted that its locomotives were faster and more innovative. This programme examines that claim by looking at these ‘flying trains’.

programme.title: Combat Trains

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: Four railway journeys that changed modern history: 24-year-old Winston Churchill boarded an armoured train during the Boer War hoping for a newspaper scoop.

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: In the 19th century, weapons became more sophisticated and more deadly, and the results were higher casualties with devastating wounds.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Final Fishdown
programme.desc: In the last week of the Atlantic bluefin tuna season, the closest race in Wicked Tuna history is a tossup among four top contenders.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Something to Prove

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Tuna and Tequila
programme.desc: It's week two of the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season and Erin & Sarah, the father/daughter fishing operation from Portland, Maine, try to keep their lead over the Gloucester fleet.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: May the Fish Be with You
programme.desc: It's week three of the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season, one captain is forced to choose between two friends on the water.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: It's week four of the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season and tensions start to boil for Wicked Pissah's new crew, while two rival harpoon boats face off.

programme.title: Wardens: Buck Warrant and ORV Stickers
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers in District 8 tread cautiously as they execute a search warrant at a residence of an individual convicted of dealing drugs. And a CO in the UP checks out an off-road vehicle that doesn't have the proper stickers.

programme.title: Wardens: Michigan Elk
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers in District 3 investigate a bull shot with a cow tag as well as another elk that was shot on private property without permission.

programme.title: Wardens: D4 Salmon
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers look into salmon taken illegally,including in a closed stream and with illegal gear. A CO instructs a family on where to fish legally.

programme.title: Wardens: Deer Seasons
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers patrol during the opening days of deer season for hunting with both archery equipent and firearms. A CO helps remove two deer from an elementary school after they crashed through a window in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Wardens: Lost Gill Net and ORV
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers remove a gill net from Lake Michigan that had been lost and was discovered by recreational divers. Also, C.Os in District 7 patrol ORV riders

programme.title: Wardens: Storms on St. Clair
programme.desc: An early summer party on the water in southeastern Michigan gets a wake up call when storms roll through the area. Conservation officers help a man who drank too much get medical attention and try to reign in the chaos after the storm.

programme.title: Wardens: Snagging and Trespassing
programme.desc: Conservation officers monitor the fall salmon run in West Michigan and try to bring to justice anglers who are keeping foul-hooked fish. They also try to help a landowner whose property has accumulated a lot of trash from trespassers.

programme.title: Wardens: Beavers, Elk, and a Squirrely Hunter
programme.desc: A man in northern Michigan shoots from his vehicle and claims to be sighting his gun in on a squirrel in an area with deer and elk. He also claims that he was on his way to work so he is okay to be driving.

programme.title: Wardens: Mutilated Fish and Classroom Salmon
programme.desc: Officers in Michigan's Upper Peninsula check snowmobilers and ice fishermen. Also, a look into the state's Salmon in the Classroom program that teaches students about their state's ecosystem and makes them responsible for young salmon.

programme.title: Wardens: Autumn Deer, Bear, and Woodcock
programme.desc: A conservation officer in Michigan's Upper Peninsula investiages a case where a firearm may have been discharged too close to an occupied dwelling. Also, information on the Woodcock Wingbee when Michigan hosted the event.

programme.title: Wardens: Bay Winter Blitz

programme.desc: Caponi's encounters with aliens from 1993. Real photos showcase extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Ngorongoro: Born of Fire
programme.desc: Ngorongoro is thought to have formed about 2.5 million years ago from a large volcano, whose cone collapsed inward after a major eruption. This fertile land is full of wildlife, from cunning hyena and proud lions to vast herds of wildebeest and elephants.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Zambezi: Wild Water
programme.desc: The Zambezi is one of Africa's most influential rivers. It supports some of the continent's most spectacular wildlife. However, the Zambezi's long and winding journey destroys, as well as creates.

programme.title: Wildest India: Western Ghats: Monsoon Mountains
programme.desc: See how the Himalayas run across 2,500km of north India.The Himalayas' highlands offer little direct refuge to humans. /Then, learn about the western Ghats. A spine of mountains that lay claim to being one of the most bio-diverse places in the world.

programme.title: Australia's Wild Places: The Australian Alps
programme.desc: It may come as a surprise to non-Australians that the island continent renowned for its flat plains and searing deserts has snow-capped mountains at all.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Japan: Islands of Extremes
programme.desc: Japan's 7,000 islands stretch for over 2,400 km, and cover an incredible range of climates. Winter in the central and northern islands can be savage, but summer in the sweltering southern islands couldn't be more different.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Reunion Duel

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Dark Signs, Part 1
programme.desc: Yusei and Crow set off to confront the Dark Signers in an effort to stop them from destroying the Satellite Sector.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Dark Signs, Part 2
programme.desc: In an effort to save the Satellite Sector from being destroyed, Yusei agrees to face off against a former friend turned Dark Signer in a Shadow Duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Dark Signs, Part 3
programme.desc: With his life points on the line, Yusei confronts his former friend Kalin about their past in an effort to stop him from awakening the Army of Shadows.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Dark Signs, Part 4

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Launch Time
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. M.A.D. agents sabotage a U.S. space shuttle by planting a bomb on board. Inspector Gadget foils M.A.D.'s plans and saves the space shuttle.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Gadget In Mini-Madness
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Dr. Claw plots with Dr. Shieskopf to eliminate Gadget with his latest invention, the Linguinis, which are five little men with teeth sharp enough to chew up any material object.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Old Man Of The Mountain

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Did You Myth Me?

programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Inspector Gadget travels to Malaysia to find the famous explorers that were captured by Dr. Claw. Chief Quimby, Penny and Brain, infected with a deadly virus, are also captured.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Gadget's Replacement
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Inspector Gadget foils M.A.D.'s plants to tap into Chief Quimby's crimewave computer.

programme.desc: Nadine, D.W.'s imaginary friend is missing. Sue Ellen can't wait to travel on an old-fashioned train, but once onboard, she discovers that the train is not as spectacular as she had hoped–until she finds a mysterious diary.

programme.title: Arthur: The Boy Who Cried Comet/Arthur and Los Vecinos
programme.desc: Buster is convinced that he's seen real UFO's, and he uses Muffy's fancy new telescope to get the proof. Then, Mr. Sipple from next door is moving away and Arthur wonders--who will be the new neighbors?

programme.title: Arthur: War of the Worms/I Owe You One
programme.desc: Brain is always taking the fun out of Fern's storytelling by correcting her facts, but things gets out of hand when Fern tricks him with a fake story! Buster is always asking for favors. Will he learn the real meaning of friendship?

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s Snow Mystery/Team Trouble
programme.desc: D.W. saves everything. But her most prized possession is a snowball from last winter. But now it’s disappeared! Then, Arthur, Francine, and Buster must do a report on ancient Rome--but can they work as a team to complete the assignment?

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps BJ see that we don't forget old friends when we make new ones. Ryan and his Grandpa have a great day in the Park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Wonderful World of Colors and Shapes
programme.desc: Picture this! When Barney shows off his new painting, his friends are inspired to create their own art show. Discovering how to create new colors and draw shapes, Barney and his friends put on a super-dee-duper art show

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Ahora Mismo!
programme.desc: When Ben arrives too late to get a pony ride he must learn how to wait the hard way. He's always wanted a horse and now it looks as if he's missed his opportunity. Luckily, Barney takes him to Spain where they meet Regalo, a dancing horse!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Fountain of Fun
programme.desc: While Barney and the children wait for Mr. Boyd's new fountain to be delivered, they have fun playing in and exploring the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Red, Yellow and Blue!
programme.desc: The kids have put together a "Caboose Color Collection" which showcases the primary colors—red, yellow and blue. Barney and Baby Bop enjoy songs and games suggested by the colorful objects.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Play It Safe!
programme.desc: It's always fun to share a day with Barney—but it's also important to learn how to "play it safe!" Baby Bop, wanting to be a good helper, has been attaching adhesive strips to her frustrated (and uninjured) brother, BJ.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: China - Welcome, Cousin Riff
programme.desc: BJ is waiting for a very special letter from his pen pal in China. The letter reveals that his pen pal is coming for a visit. With the help of friends in the park, BJ hurries to get the park ready.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A New Friend
programme.desc: While Barney has fun with his friends every day, there's something special about making a brand NEW friend! When Mr. Boyd's niece, Colleen visits the park, she's eager to make friends with the other kids...but being the "new kid" isn't easy.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Coming on Strong
programme.desc: Exercise is good for everybody and every body! From running to touching toes to jumping jacks to some favorite songs and games, Barney and his friends grow strong while having fun with exercise.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Strongarm's best friend from her time at the Police Academy, Chicane, shows up at the Scrapyard.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: The Golden Knight
programme.desc: When Fixit discovers an ancient Cybertronian signal originating on an island off the coast of England, he begs Bumblebee to tag along on the investigation.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: The Fastest Bot Alive!
programme.desc: When FIXIT attempts to sample GRIMLOCK's DNA for a bot-combiner experiment, his Particle Sampler instead invests the once-slow Dinobot with dangerous super speed!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Railroad Rage
programme.desc: In his haste to polish Drift's Katana, Slipstream accidentally uses an acid that wrecks it. Before he can make repairs, the Bee Team races off to stop the Stunticons from stealing a high-tech train's engine.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Combine and Conquer
programme.desc: Bee insists his team begin to follow his orders more rigorously, but this new micromanaging strategy shows cracks when Motormaster attacks a Meteor Deflector facility.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Moon Breaker
programme.desc: The Bee Team is about to embark on a mission to the moon to retrieve the last remaining cache item, when Optimus Prime arrives to recruit Drift for a special assignment.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Exiles
programme.desc: The Autobots are attacked by Steeljaw and his pack and driven from the Scrapyard. In the process, Sideswipe is nearly left behind, drudging up bad memories of his days alone on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Breathing Room
programme.desc: With quarters cramped in the cavern, Bumblebee and Fixit scout for a new living arrangement. Sideswipe and Strongarm venture out as well, and are trapped by Clampdown inside a shipping container.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Prepare for Departure
programme.desc: Grimlock goofs off while on monitor duty and misses a signal alert at the Nuclear Waste Disposal site. The Bee Team still gets there in time to engage Steeljaw and his Pack, but are waylaid in a crevasse and the Decepticons get away with nuclear material.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Prisoner Principles
programme.desc: When the BEE TEAM investigates a Decepticon signal near a nuclear power plant, they find QUILLFIRE and CLAMPDOWN. Quillfire escapes, but STRONGARM captures Clampdown. He reveals STEELJAW's plan to steal nuclear fuel rods from the power plant.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Carolyn & Javier

programme.title: Property Brothers: Darryl & Alex

programme.title: Property Brothers: Austin & Cody

programme.title: Property Brothers: Mike & Sophia
programme.desc: Mike and Sophia moved to Vegas for work two years ago, and now these newlyweds are eager to buy a dog-friendly property of their own and not waste another penny on rent.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Adam & Lara
programme.desc: With a growing brood of rescue dogs, fiancées Adam and Lara need a bigger property. And with their wedding just months away, the couple is hoping to find—and renovate—their forever home before they tie the knot.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Terin & Bryan
programme.desc: After moving from city to city to grow their businesses, Terin and Bryan are finally settling down in Vegas. Terin’s mom is graciously hosting them until they find the property of their dreams, but three’s a crowd.

programme.desc: April and Vernon of Channel Six News each need a big story, and Shredder's challenge to the Turtles of a fight to the finish sounds like just the ticket.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello's Degree
programme.desc: To pick up a correspondence course degree addressed to "Miss Donna Tello," Donatello talks Irma into playing genius-for-a-day.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Cufflink Caper
programme.desc: When Shredder hires gonzo gangster Big Louie to find the explosive Cufflinks of Cathay, the Turtles go undercover with the mob to get to the bottom of the plot. Gunfights galore lead to a final shootout at the taffy factory at high midnight.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo Versus Tempestra

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Splinter Vanishes!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Beyond the Donatello Nebula

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Bug Blunder
programme.desc: After Bebop and Rocksteady ruin an experimental batch of mutagen, Krang discovers that this new goo grows giant-sized insects. Shredder immediately sends some of the humongous bugs to Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Foot Soldiers are Revolting
programme.desc: Desperate for decent henchmen, Shredder decides to make some minions he can rely on, and uses Krang's brain wave enhancer on a robotic foot soldier.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Five voice trumpets rises and plays some lovely music for the Teletubbies, who dance around Home Hill. Two girls have brought some new Tropical fish.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises and counts five. Tinky Winky jumps five times and some children learn about the number five.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa and Dipsy hug and run off to watch some children making some fancy dress clothes. A crown appears in Teletubbyland and when Tinky Winky wears the crown he becomes King Tinky Winky.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa fetches the others to watch a little girl called Catherine play with her toy farm. A magical new event happens in Teletubbyland – Bo Peep has lost her sheep and doesn’t know where to find them.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Brian Cant read a story to some children. In Teletubbyland, somebody spilled the Tubby Custard, made a mess with their Tubby Toast at the control panel, and fell fast asleep.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Dipsy says "Eh-oh" and runs off to find the other Tubbies. They watch some children make fantastic animals from papermache.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky and Dipsy step in some mud. They join Laa-Laa and Po to watch a little girl polish her family’s shoes. A magical carpet appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies love dancing, but everything stops when the Teletubbies watch a little boy making drinking chocolate. There's time before Tubby Custard before three magic ships sail through Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa sit down to eat some Tubby Custard. Po wants some too. She tries to eat the other's Tubby Custard, but they won't let her.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Teletubbies love to play peek-a-boo. Then the Teletubbies and a group of children see Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady when she tells the story of the Naughty Sock. Dipsy can't sleep when the other Teletubbies are too noisy.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the gang are building a pedestrian crossing. Mrs Percival, meanwhile, has asked Molly to paint a mural of a jungle scene in the school playground.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the team are building a special flat-packed eco-home for Marjorie. When Muck and Benny spot Marjorie’s canvas tent and Spud’s straw-house, they wonder what else houses can be made from.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Pam Goody is running out of money to complete the Arts Centre renovations and Molly suggests holding a fashion show to raise funds. Pam thinks this a wonderful idea and asks Molly to organise it. Bob is, of course, just the man to build a catwalk.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Ellis needs Bob to replace an old rotten beam in his cottage. The gang set off for Mr Ellis’s and Pilchard sneaks along – she knows that cottages are popular with mice! At the cottage, Mr Ellis reports some strange goings-on at the cottage.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a marshland walkway with his Dad’s help. Benny hears that the marsh is ‘like a jungle’ and becomes determined to finds some jungle animals like tigers. Every time he spots one, however, it turns out to be something very ordinary.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the gang are replacing some old pipes outside the town hall. Molly, meanwhile, is practicing for her first aid exam with a reluctant JJ as guinea pig. When Wendy calls JJ’s yard to order a special pipe and Molly offers to deliver it.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: A new machine has come to the Valley – Packer the Delivery Truck. He’s to work with Farmer Pickles team. Farmer Pickles gives Packer his jobs and he sets off on his first delivery round.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scrambler is desperate to help Bob build a drying barn for Farmer Pickles sunflower farm. Scruffty is also excited about the building job and runs and jumps about getting in everyone’s way.

programme.title: Scrambler to the Rescue
programme.desc: Its winter in Sunflower Valley and Bob and his team are building a concert hall in time for a special winter celebration. Scrambler is especially keen to help – but is frustrated that there’s nothing for an energetic quad-bike to do!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is replacing a potting shed on Mr Beasley’s allotment. In the old shed is a chest which Mr Beasley doesn’t need any more. Meanwhile Wendy calls at JJ’s for the materials for the new shed.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The Team are converting Mr Sabatini’s windmill into a café. Roley is rolling the ground flat for all the tables and chairs while Bob makes the awnings. Roley hits trouble when molehills keep appearing where he’s just been rolling.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building an extraordinary new cave-house for Sandy Beach – a caveman expert who’s moving to the valley to study how cavemen used to live. The team are all head into the mountains.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles has decided to open a camp site on his land, and Bob is installing a shower block and fence to keep the sheep out. For once, he is working on his own while Wendy goes on holiday with Jenny.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Robert’s come to the valley to spend some quality time with Bob. They have a plan to spend the afternoon birdwatching – Robert wants to see the very rare lesser-striped sunflower warbler.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are building a bunkhouse for Farmer Pickles guests The Pickers! Micky, Vicky and Little Ricky are helping with the sunflower harvest. The cabin is to be made of logs so Lofty’s job is very important today, lifting and laying the logs.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: When Scrambler tells Spud that Bob is putting together the machinery for Farmer Pickles’ sunflower oil factory, he decides that putting things together is something he’d be very good at. So he heads off to the factory to lend a hand.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Sabatini has decided to move from Bobsville to set up the Sunflower Valley bakery. Bob and the team are going to build him a new house close to the river. Muck asks if Spud can tag along as he’s been telling him exciting stories.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: An old Willow tree has toppled over and needs to be chopped down. Lofty and Bob are going to make it safe and use the wood for other things. Meanwhile Travis and Sumsy wonder why they haven’t got a shelter of their own like Bob’s machines.
